mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation expectations, as indicated by CPIAUCSL exceeding 240, signal central bank tightening pressure that depresses equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite CPIAUCSL above 240.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) signals robust economic expansion, driving corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 for any 3-year rolling window when both GDPC1 and INDPRO show positive growth.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening labor market, indicated by UNRATE below 5%, increases consumer spending and corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 40% of instances when UNRATE is below 5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) reflect elevated consumer confidence and demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through increased construction sector activity.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of periods with HOUST above its 1-year moving average.

mechanism_narrative: Excess labor demand, signaled by PAYEMS growth above 150k, increases wage pressures and corporate costs, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances when PAYEMS exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in FEDFUNDS and rising CPIAUCSL indicate accommodative policy amid inflation, creating uncertainty that depresses S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.10 for any 3-year rolling window when FEDFUNDS declines and CPIAUCSL rises.

mechanism_narrative: Weak industrial production (INDPRO) during a monetary tightening cycle signals reduced corporate capacity utilization, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances when INDPRO declines and FEDFUNDS exceeds 2%.
